The Artist

Trained In Tradition.
Tuned For The Camera.

Ravi started behind the chair doing bridal mornings before sunrise, and now splits the calendar between wedding season and shoot days for campaigns and red carpets. The training is classical Indian bridal work — the instinct is for whatever the lens needs that day.

150+Brides Styled
8 YrsOn Set & Backstage
Delhi · MumbaiBased & Touring

Shringaar

Sanskrit, roughly: the art of adornment — getting ready treated as its own small ceremony. Every booking starts there, not with "what style," but with what the day is asking the woman wearing it to feel like.
